tests.name: index_page_served

tests.name: cache_control_header
tests.details: HTML response includes Cache-Control: no-cache HTTP header (not meta tag)

tests.name: html_structure
tests.details: 7 slider inputs (S, L, Iteration, C, W, F, Delta), 3 coordinate display spans (coord-x, coord-y, coord-z), canvas container

tests.name: formula_computation
tests.details: Default values (all 5): X=(5*5)*5=125, Y=5²=25, Z=5-5*5=-20. Code review confirms correct formulas in sliders.js

tests.name: threejs_scene_code
tests.details: main.js: Scene, PerspectiveCamera, WebGLRenderer, OrbitControls, 3 axes (red/green/blue), tick marks, labels, reference planes, sphere with projection lines, animation loop
